info.title: Irish Oireachtas Records - All TD & Senator Votes
info.subtitle: 750k+ vote records from Dáil Éireann, Seanad Éireann & Oireachtas (2010-2026)
info.description:
## What this is
754,207 Dáil and Seanad division records since 2002, cleaned into a 
single flat CSV. One row per member per vote, pulled directly from the 
Oireachtas Open Data API.

## Columns

| Column | Description |
|---|---|
| date | Date of the division |
| house | dail or seanad |
| house_name | e.g. "34th Dáil", "27th Seanad", or committee name |
| vote_id | Unique vote identifier within that day and house |
| subject | What was being voted on |
| outcome | Carried or Lost |
| is_bill | Whether the vote relates to legislation |
| member_name | TD or Senator name |
| member_code | Unique member identifier |
| party | Political party |
| constituency | Constituency or Seanad panel |
| vote | Tá (yes), Níl (no), or Staon (abstain) |

## Questions you can answer
- Which TDs vote against their party most often?
- How has party discipline changed across coalitions?
- What does the voting record of a specific TD look like over time?
- Which bills passed with the narrowest margins?

## Source & Licence
Oireachtas Open Data API — api.oireachtas.ie. Oireachtas PSI open 
licence. Redistributed under CC BY 4.0.
